CustomField.formula: IF(OR(Location__Latitude__s> 0,Location__Longitude__s > 0), HYPERLINK("http://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=" + IF(Location__Latitude__s< 1,"0" + TEXT (Location__Latitude__s ), TEXT( Location__Latitude__s ))+ "," + IF(Location__Longitude__s < 1, "0" + TEXT(Location__Longitude__s), TEXT (Location__Longitude__s)),"Link to Location"), "")
CustomField.label: Location Legal Entity
